reason: Modifying /etc/fstab to add a mount option changes the filesystem configuration. If applied incorrectly, it can prevent /home from mounting properly, leading to login failures or loss of user data. Per policy, filesystem/partition changes are classified as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; potential boot or mount failure; possible loss of access to user home directories; requires system reboot to take effect
